text:
Dobila sam fleke (hiperpigmentacija) od epilacije, što bi i bilo rješivo da nisam imala najgore iskustvo u komunikaciji sa vlasnicom i dermatološkinjom centra, Vanjom Banićević, koja je krajnje neprofesionalna i, uz to, neljubazna i nadobudna. Nažalost, apsolutno nije vrijedno odlaska, a posebno zbog nepoštovanja korisnika usluga od strane vlasnice.

I got spots (hyperpigmentation) from epilation, which would have been solved if I hadn't had the worst experience in communication with the center's owner and dermatologist, Vanja, who is extremely unprofessional and, moreover, unkind and pushy. Unfortunately, it is absolutely not worth going, especially because of the disrespect of service users by the owner.

translations.sr:
Dobila sam fleke (hiperpigmentacija) od epilacije, što bi i bilo rešivo da nisam imala najgore iskustvo u komunikaciji sa vlasnicom i dermatološkinjom centra, Vanjom Banićević, koja je krajnje neprofesionalna i, uz to, neljubazna i nadobudna. Nažalost, apsolutno nije vredno odlaska, a posebno zbog nepoštovanja korisnika usluga od strane vlasnice.

I got spots (hyperpigmentation) from epilation, which would have been solved if I hadn't had the worst experience in communication with the center's owner and dermatologist, Vanja, who is extremely unprofessional and, moreover, unkind and pushy. Unfortunately, it is absolutely not worth going, especially because of the disrespect of service users by the owner.
translations.sr_cyrl:
Добила сам флеке (хиперпигментација) од епилације, што би и било решиво да нисам имала најгоре искуство у комуникацији са власницом и дерматолошкињом центра, Вањом Банићевић, која је крајње непрофесионална и, уз то, нељубазна и надобудна. Нажалост, апсолутно није вредно одласка, а посебно због непоштовања корисника услуга од стране власнице.

I got spots (hyperpigmentation) from epilation, which would have been solved if I hadn't had the worst experience in communication with the center's owner and dermatologist, Vanja, who is extremely unprofessional and, moreover, unkind and pushy. Unfortunately, it is absolutely not worth going, especially because of the disrespect of service users by the owner.
translations.en: I got spots (hyperpigmentation) from epilation, which would have been solvable if I hadn't had the worst experience in communication with the owner and dermatologist of the center, Vanja Banićević, who is extremely unprofessional and, moreover, unkind and pushy. Unfortunately, it is absolutely not worth going, especially because of the disrespect of service users by the owner.
translations.ru: Получила пятна (гиперпигментацию) от эпиляции, что было бы решаемо, если бы не худший опыт общения с владелицей и дерматологом центра, Vanja Banićević, которая крайне непрофессиональна и к тому же грубая и надменная. К сожалению, абсолютно не стоит посещения, особенно из-за неуважения к клиентам со стороны владелицы.
translations.de: Ich bekam Flecken (Hyperpigmentierung) von der Epilation, was lösbar gewesen wäre, hätte ich nicht die schlimmste Erfahrung in der Kommunikation mit der Inhaberin und Dermatologin des Zentrums, Vanja Banićević, gehabt, die äußerst unprofessionell und dazu unfreundlich und überheblich ist. Leider ist es absolut nicht den Besuch wert, besonders wegen der Missachtung der Kunden durch die Inhaberin.
translations.tr: Epilasyondan lekeler (hiperpigmentasyon) oluştu, merkez sahibi ve dermatolog Vanja Banićević ile iletişimde en kötü deneyimi yaşamamış olsam çözülebilirdi. Son derece profesyonel değil, üstelik kaba ve ukala. Ne yazık ki, gitmeye kesinlikle değmez, özellikle sahibinin müşterilere gösterdiği saygısızlık yüzünden.
